title: 26 By Biosemi
description: This EEG dataset comprises recordings from 26 participants who received laser stimulation at fixed intensity while providing pain ratings on a 0-10 scale. The study investigates the neural correlates of pain perception and subjective pain ratings in response to nociceptive stimuli, with potential applications to understanding pain modulation mechanisms.
methods_description: Participants underwent laser stimulation at individually calibrated fixed intensity, with stimuli presented approximately every 20 seconds for 16 trials. EEG was recorded using a BioSemi system during the task. Following each laser stimulus, participants provided pain intensity ratings (0-10 scale) via computer mouse within a 3-5 second window, with inter-trial intervals of 1-3 seconds.
